allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''resend:'', p.dependencies.resend\); console.log\(''@google-analytics/data:'', p.dependencies[''@google-analytics/data'']\)")

Bash(node -e "try { const { BetaAnalyticsDataClient } = require\(''@google-analytics/data''\); console.log\(''BetaAnalyticsDataClient:'', typeof BetaAnalyticsDataClient\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''ERROR:'', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const { Resend } = require\(''resend''\); const r = new Resend\(''test''\); console.log\(''emails.send:'', typeof r.emails?.send\);")
